mapper.sql: id, trace_code AS traceCode, spu_id AS spuId, action_type AS actionType, from_node AS fromNode, to_node AS toNode, province, city, remark, event_time AS eventTime, ingest_time AS ingestTime, prev_hash AS prevHash, current_hash AS currentHash, correction_of AS correctionOf, operator, signature, signature_key_id AS signatureKeyId, signature_key_version AS signatureKeyVersion, create_time AS createTime

l.id, l.trace_code AS traceCode, l.spu_id AS spuId, l.action_type AS actionType, l.from_node AS fromNode, l.to_node AS toNode, l.province, l.city, l.remark, l.event_time AS eventTime, l.ingest_time AS ingestTime, l.prev_hash AS prevHash, l.current_hash AS currentHash, l.correction_of AS correctionOf, l.operator, l.signature, l.signature_key_id AS signatureKeyId, l.signature_key_version AS signatureKeyVersion, l.create_time AS createTime
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM trace_lifecycle_log WHERE trace_code = #{traceCode} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM trace_lifecycle_log l LEFT JOIN trace_lifecycle_log c ON c.correction_of = l.id WHERE l.trace_code = #{traceCode} AND c.id IS NULL ORDER BY l.event_time ASC, l.id ASC

SELECT from_node AS source, to_node AS target FROM trace_lifecycle_log WHERE (#{traceCode} IS NULL OR trace_code = #{traceCode}) AND from_node IS NOT NULL AND from_node != '' AND to_node IS NOT NULL AND to_node != '' ORDER BY event_time ASC, id ASC

SELECT
FROM trace_lifecycle_log WHERE trace_code = #{traceCode} ORDER BY id ASC
